title: calamagrostis sorengii
intro: Calamagrostis sorengii, also known as the Soreng's grass or Soreng's fescue, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Calamagrostis sorengii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal tinctures and salves, making it a versatile and useful addition to natural health remedies.
